assumption_note: Canceled reservations are subtracted by class/month/method. Pass settlement band is clarified as consumer-level monthly completed pass-use count. This project only observes Yeonhui Yoga Week ON STUDIO records, not each consumer's full Obud monthly usage, so the pass estimate is a lower-bound estimate until the final Obud settlement statement is available.
